task: Show me the wind flow map for Belo Horizonte.
graderReasoning: The agent ultimately reached AccuWeather’s wind-flow map and verified/programmatically set the map center to Belo Horizonte’s coordinates (-43.9345, -19.9208) at zoom 8. Evidence appears in step 34 and again in step 51, where the page evaluation confirms the wind-flow map object exists, is centered on Belo Horizonte, and the canvas was successfully extracted as a PNG. Although the page URL remained the national Brazil wind-flow page, the task was to show the wind flow map for Belo Horizonte, and the agent did so by centering the live map on Belo Horizonte and producing the map image.
final_result_response:
Done. I centered the wind-flow map on Belo Horizonte and extracted the map canvas directly.

![Belo Horizonte wind flow map](./artifacts/belo_horizonte_wind_flow_canvas.png)
action_history: Opening AccuWeather: const p0 = await openTab('https://www.accuweather.com/');
Opening Belo Horizonte weather: await page.locator('e15').click();
Selecting Wind Flow map: await page.locator('e34').click();
Trying Minas Gerais wind map URL: await openTab('https://www.accuweather.com/en/br/minas-gerais/wind-flow');
